title: format_receipt_timestamp_at: future timestamps fall to 'Apr 12' branch
description: If dt > now, (now_date - dt_date).num_days() is negative. The match falls to the _ arm and displays as 'Apr 12'. For a message with clock skew (server timestamp slightly in the future), the caller sees a past-date format instead of 'Today'. Fix: handle days_diff <= 0 as 'Today' or add a guard. Trigger: message received with sentAt 1 second in the future due to clock skew.
